subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Aqa Mirza Husayn: the friends in Sísan, with utmost longing, yearn for the sight of your countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا میرزا حسین حضرات سیسان بنهایت اشتیاق آرزوی روی شما را مینمایند البته
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @importance of community building
